body.title: CLOSED: Deprecate igor_mcp.py and cc_mcp_server.py once Librarian is live
body.result: deprecation header added to igor_mcp.py; cc_mcp_server.py already gone; T-igor-mcp-delete filed; b644904f
body.description:
Once T-librarian-mcp-tools is complete and verified, deprecate the legacy MCP servers.

Steps:
1. Verify all tools ported and tested in Librarian
2. Update ~/.claude.json to point 'igor' MCP entry at Librarian
3. Remove 'cc_mcp' entry from ~/.claude.json
4. Add deprecation notice to igor_mcp.py and cc_mcp_server.py headers
5. File a follow-up ticket to delete both files after one sprint cycle without issues

**Affected files:** TheIgors/lab/claudecode/igor_mcp.py, TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_mcp_server.py, ~/.claude.json
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** deprecation notices + config redirect only; no deletion in this ticket
**Test plan:** after redirect, `claude mcp list` shows Librarian healthy; db_query via MCP returns correct data
